content: Language educators can adapt the iterative self-feedback framework of AI's Self-Refine to structure student reflective writing practice (the human-learning sense of reflexion), turning open-ended reflection assignments into a step-by-step skill-building process rather than a one-off subjective exercise. This approach frames reflection not as a static end-of-unit task, but as an iterative refinement of one's own thinking that mirrors how AI improves its own outputs.
